event: differential diagnoses (PRP, psoriasis, atopic dermatitis, epidermotropic cutaneous T-cell lymphoma)
negative skin and blood T-cell clone
whole genome sequencing including CARD14 sequencing (no causal mutation)
unsuccessful treatments (topical corticosteroids, acitretin, photochemotherapy, cyclosporine, methotrexate, infliximab, ustekinumab, intravenous immunoglobulin, omalizumab)
prednisone efficient but relapsed at <0.5 mg/kg/d
partial improvement with cyclosporine (5 mg/kg/d) and 10 mg prednisone
Psoriasis area and severity index decreased (27.6 to 5.6)
Dermatologic life quality index score decreased (30 to 15)
no recurrence of PRP lesions at 6-month follow-up
improvement of erythematous plaques after 2 weeks
improvement of palmoplantar keratoderma after 2 weeks
